message: chore: update version to latest commit

files.patch:
@@ -1,10 +1,10 @@
 // This file is auto-generated by the build script. Do not edit manually.
 enum Version {
     static let current = "Peekaboo 3.0.0"
-    static let gitCommit = "25907d4d-dirty"
-    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-12 04:36:26 +0000"
+    static let gitCommit = "2bf9cf7c-dirty"
+    static let gitCommitDate = "2025-11-12 04:37:03 +0000"
     static let gitBranch = "main"
-    static let buildDate = "2025-11-12T04:36:30+00:00"
+    static let buildDate = "2025-11-12T04:37:11+00:00"
     
     static var fullVersion: String {
         return "\(current) (\(gitBranch)/\(gitCommit), built: \(buildDate))"
